choice: v1 screens: (1) Dashboard — success probability, net worth by bucket, three-layer tracking chart, staleness + sync; (2) Scenarios — edit assumption sets, run Forecasts, compare overlays, set active Plan; (3) Assets — accounts and manual assets, balance history, CSV import/manual entry, E*TRADE connect, plus position-level holdings with attribution (which holdings drove balance moves between snapshots); (4) Allocation — current allocation from positions vs a user-set target, drift, and simple rebalancing suggestions (no optimization); (5) Household settings — persons, streams, contributions, members. OUT of v1: expense tracking integration, notifications/email, native mobile apps.
rationale: User added holdings attribution and allocation/rebalancing to v1; expenses stay an assumption; no notifications
